author: @darchorse915
text: What's it made of? Can I make it too or buy the recipe off you?

author: @sanguinefern
text:
Hi Robert,
Would you ever consider offering your Ecofoam products on a wide scale in the U.S.? They could do so well here.

author: @mkhamlach
text: hi Mate, i send you a request to have your permission to see your soap site.

replies.text: +Mo Kha It's no longer active mate - I have removed the link - i just forgot to do it earlier

author: @bridgendesar
text: I wonder what NASA would think about this stuff?

author: @sniffy6999999
text: Robert,  this is the best thing I have seen for ages.You have a good day.

author: @africanelectron751
text:
Best of luck with business If you want to sell this stuff in South Africa im sure i could find clients in the local manufacturing industry and mining sector.
Have you tried adding povidone iodine (if its possible i dont know much about chemistry) to make surgical scrub for military field use, or for humanitarian workers.
Its a brilliant product with huge potential.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text:
Hiya Mate,

Write to me at robertmurraysmith64@gmail.com- i would definately be interested in selling in SA

author: @Bobandus
text: 10 quid for shipping for 132g of product, this surely is a mistake?

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: it is - it should be 10 quid for a kilo

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: Thanks for pointing that out - I changes it - now reads 4.10

replies.author: @Bobandus
replies.text: how long before you have the mechanics grade one out?

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text:
DrQuiMobile
Should be a couple of weeks - just waiting for the safety certificate

author: @consciousenergies
text: Just teasing you my friend. It's good to see a video from you. I hope your holidays were most excellent.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: bless your heart mate - sometimes - i need to have a laugh lol

author: @consciousenergies
text: Washing your hands clean of the vacuum tube experimentation? ;) I wish you luck on making a little funding money. Would this be a proprietary blend of sorts?

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: No! - I need funding so thanks for the good wishes and I guess so lol

author: @asuscristo
text: Hey Robert. Ive been making my own oxygenated soaps , hand , body , toothpaste and shampoos for years . I absolutely love your videos.  Welcome aboard!  Soap is a major market and you have my blessings. God Speed to you. I have kept my action very local in a small midwestern us town and the Saturday farmers market handles all my family food and energy costs. Return customers, true beleivers and cross selling does the rest. Cheers and good luck.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: thanks for that mate - good luck to you too

author: @postiemania
text: Great idea and good to see it safety tested and put on the register. Have you thought about crowd funding the enterprise?

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I hadn't thought about crowd funding - no - but good idea

replies.author: @postiemania
replies.text: Maybe remote mine sites could use this. Save weight = save on freight costs. I know mines us a lot of hand wash.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: another good idea - i should call them.

author: @postiemania
text: Great idea and good to see it safety tested and put on the register. Have you thought about crowd funding the enterprise?

author: @xwarmangle
text:
I'm going to give this a try! 

Do you have a laundry soap formula?  Tablets?

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: not yet no - it takes a while to come up with this stuff lol

author: @Erdie5
text: What a great idea.  I hope it brings you success.

author: @m3sca1
text: Brilliant idea...take out the water...reduce the cost on shipping, manufacturer, and ideally once you buy the foaming pump then you just have to buy the powder...and the pump doesn't end up in landfill after every purchase.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I know it's not earth shattering - but it helps a little bit
